variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 6276 Air Filter | Replaces the Wix Filter SA10555
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SA 6276 Air Filter is HiFi's replacement to the Wix Filter SA10555. Easy to install and replace, the SA 6276 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
